subtitle: Calculator & Unit Converter
description:
Base is a personal number & unit Swiss-army-knife. Calculator, unit converter, and tip splitter — one clean screen, no ads, no account, no subscription.

Features:
• Calculator with live result preview and history
• Unit converter for length, mass, volume, temperature, and currency
• Tip splitter — adjust tip percentage, split any number of ways
• Beautiful dark & light mode with haptic feedback
• No account, no analytics, no ads

“Finally, a calculator that doesn't try to sell me something.”
promoText: Quick math, quick conversions. No account needed.
releaseNotes:
• Initial release
• Calculator with Shunting-yard expression parser
• Unit converter — 5 categories, 30+ units
• Tip splitter with adjustable tip and person count
• Dark & light mode
• History with tap-to-recall
